name: Touhou Iseaki
description: Welcome, traveler, to the mystical land of Gensokyo. You have been transported here after a fateful encounter with the infamous Truck-kun. As you navigate this enchanting world, you will encounter various characters, face challenges, and uncover the secrets that Gensokyo holds. Your actions and decisions will shape your journey, so choose wisely and immerse yourself in the story that unfolds. Let the adventure begin!
creator: Awesome_Phantom
